user_query: How do I rotate the Acme API signing key?

retrieved_context.text: Invoices are generated on the first day of each month. Billing admins can download invoices from the account settings page.
Acme Vector Cache stores embeddings and retrieval results for repeated semantic search queries.

llm_answer: Rotate the API signing key from the security settings page and deploy the new key to all services.
reference_answer: API signing keys can be rotated from Security Settings by creating a new key, deploying it, and revoking the old key.
